questions.question: What is the name of the event observed by all Ministries for a fortnight, to focus on the issues of ‘Swachhata’?
questions.explanation: Under the Swachh Bharat Mission of the Ministry of Jal Shakti, an event with a duration of a fortnight is observed to focus on the issues of Swachhata.Named as ‘Swachhata Pakhwada’, the event was started in the year 2016 and an annual calendar is provided to the Ministries with a fortnight allotted to them. Recently, the Department of Fertilizers is observing Swachhta Pakhwada from September 1-15.

questions.question: As per the Bloomberg Billionaires Index, who surpassed Mark Zuckerberg to become the third-richest person in the world?
questions.explanation: As per the Bloomberg Billionaires Index, the CEO of the leading space company SpaceX, Elon Musk is now the third-richest person in the world.The 49-year old billionaire has surpassed Facebook co-founder Mark Zuckerberg. Elon Musk’s net worth raised to USD115.4 billion while that of Zuckerberg is USD 110.8 billion. The first and the second positions were featured by Bill Gates and Jeff Bezos respectively.

questions.question: Which Indian state/UT launched its third Sero Survey, to check for the antibodies against Covid-19?
questions.explanation: The third round of the monthly sero-prevalence survey began in the National Capital Region, to analyse the situation of the Covid-19 spread.Under the survey, using the blood samples, the presence of antibodies for Covid-19 will be checked, which will explain the extent of the spread of the virus. In the last survey, it was found that 29.1 per cent of people had antibodies. This time, the sample size will be 17,000.

questions.question: India held a virtual meeting with which country on Maritime security and co-operation?
questions.explanation: Union Foreign affairs minister S Jaishankar held a virtual meeting with his Nigerian counterpart Geoffrey Onyeama.The discussion focussed on India-Nigeria bilateral relations in Maritime security and co-operation. They also discussed on collaboration on political Security, Economic and Defence security. India is Nigeria’s largest trading partner and Nigeria is India’s largest trading partner in Africa.

questions.question: Which Ministry has released the SOP for metro train operations in the country?

options.label: A
options.text: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology

options.label: B
options.text: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare

options.label: C
options.text: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs

answer.label: C
answer.text: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs

questions.explanation: The Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs (MoHUA) has released Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) operation of Metro Trains in the country.The metro services are set to restart from 7th September. It has been directed that wearing of face mask is mandatory for all passengers and staff. In order to ensure social distancing, markings at stations and inside trains will also be done.

questions.question: As per the U.S. Department of Defense’s 2020 report, which country has the largest navy in the world?
questions.explanation: The United States Department of Defense released its 2020 annual report to the US Congress, on Chinese military power.As per the DoD report, China has the largest navy in the world, with a battle force of around 350 ships and submarines including over 130 major surface combatants. Whereas, the U.S. Navy’s battle force is approximately 293 ships.

questions.question: Which country played host to the G-20 Foreign Ministers meeting?
questions.explanation: The “G-20 foreign ministers meeting” was hosted virtually by Saudi Arabia from Riyadh. India’s External Affairs Minister S Jaishankar represented India. During the meeting, he proposed for the development of voluntary ‘G-20 Principles on Coordinated Cross-Border Movement of People’. Discussions during the meeting focused on strengthening international cooperation across borders amidst COVID-19 crisis.

questions.question: Which country has recently permitted flights bound to UAE to fly through its air space, after Saudi Arabia?
questions.explanation: In a diplomatic move, Bahrain has permitted all flights coming to and departing from the United Arab Emirates to fly through its air space. The decision was taken by the Civil Aviation Affairs department of the country after it has received a request from UAE. A similar announcement was made by the neighbouring country Saudi Arabia recently.

questions.question: The first-ever Cannabis medicine project is to be set up in which state/UT?
questions.explanation: As per the news from the Prime Minister’s Office, the first-ever cannabis medicine project will be set up at Indian Institute of Integrative Medicine (IIIM) in Jammu.This project will be the first major foreign investment in Jammu and Kashmir after it became a Union Territory (UT). It will be established in collaboration with Canada. The medicine prepared from Cannabis are used to produce pain-relief medicine.

questions.question: The Light Utility Helicopter (LUH) that has been tested for hot and high weather conditions, is developed by which organisation?
questions.explanation: The Hindustan Aeronautical Limited-HAL’s indigenously developed Light Utility Helicopter (LUH) has successfully demonstrated high altitude capability in hot and high weather conditions in the Himalayas.The helicopter also demonstrated its payload capability in Siachen glacier. The Army version of LUH is to be presented for Initial Operational Clearance.
